d.description: Credential SAID (self-addressing identifier of this credential)

i.description: Issuee AID — the holder's KERI identifier

ri.description: Registry SAID — issuer's Transaction Event Log (TEL) registry for revocation

s.description: Schema SAID — must equal the $id of this schema

a.description: Attribute block — either compact (SAID only) or full attributes

oneOf.description: Compact variant — used during transport/chaining; 'd' is the SAID of the full attribute block

d.description: SAID of the full attribute block

oneOf.description: Full attributes variant — the disclosed credential content

i.description: Issuee AID — must match the top-level 'i' field

address.description: Residential address at time of issuance

_notes.said: The $id is the SAID of this schema document. Computed by saidifying the content with $id set to ''. Must match the filename served at /oobi/<said>.
_notes.compact_vs_full: ACDC transports the compact variant (a.d only) during issuance/chaining. The holder discloses the full 'a' block selectively. Both variants must pass oneOf validation — that is why additionalProperties:false is required on the compact variant.
_notes.recompute_said: If any field in this schema changes, run scripts/compute-sedi-said.ts to get the new SAID, rename this file, and update SEDI_SCHEMA_SAID in consts.ts and sediApiService.ts.
